name: Communications Solutions Company
message: Ltd (CSC) is a Saudi Arabian Company based in Riyadh. CSC is a leading company in Telecommunication & Networking field services. CSC is accredited by STC, ACWA Power, MOFA, SEC, GASCO, Mobily, Zain, SWCC, KJO, Siemens, Nokia, Ericsson and Saudi Aramco.
